general_feedback: The added @param descriptions for `_i0` and `_iN` accurately describe their roles as inclusive start and exclusive end char indices, matching how they are passed to `IndexedStepperBase` and used in the sibling `CodePointStringStepper`. The wording is concise, consistent with the existing `underlying` and `i0`/`iN` documentation in the same file, follows Scaladoc conventions (lowercase start, backticks not needed here), and clearly indicates the inclusive/exclusive boundaries.
